title: PRAXIC AntiCheat
description: Server-side AntiCheat for Fabric. No client installation required.
body:
![PRAXIC](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jrxmod/praxic/main/docs/assets/hero.png) ### Server-side anticheat for Fabric 1.21.1 *No client mod required. One jar. Every check enabled by default.* [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/praxic) [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-f16436?logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/praxic-anticheat) [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-181717?logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/jrxmod/praxic)
---
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jrxmod/praxic/main/docs/assets/feature-detection.png) ### ⚡ 14 Detection Modules
| | Movement | | Combat | | World | | Client | |---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---| | ⚡ | Fly | 🗡️ | Reach | 🧱 | Scaffold | 🖱️ | AutoClicker | | 🔮 | Y-Prediction | 🌀 | KillAura | ⛏️ | FastBreak | 🧿 | AutoTotem | | 🏃 | Speed | 💥 | Velocity | 🪂 | NoFall | 🎒 | Inventory | | 🌊 | Jesus | | | | | ⏱️ | Timer | Each check runs independently. Own sensitivity, own cooldown, own response action. Toggle on or off. One config file. ---
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jrxmod/praxic/main/docs/assets/feature-engine.png) ### 🔮 Smart Engine
🧠 **Physics Prediction** — Simulates vanilla gravity tick by tick. Compares predicted position to actual. Catches fly and hover that threshold checks miss. 🌐 **Lag Compensation** — Thresholds scale with each player's latency. No configuration needed. 🔄 **Violation Decay** — VL decreases over time without new flags. Clean players recover on their own. ↩️ **Setback** — Silent teleport to last safe position instead of disconnect. ---
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jrxmod/praxic/main/docs/assets/feature-actions.png) ### ⚙️ Actions
Every check carries its own configurable response: | | Action | Behavior | |---|---|---| | ⚠️ | **Warn** | Alert the player, log the violation | | 🚪 | **Kick** | Immediate disconnect | | 🔨 | **Ban** | Permanent, automatic | | ↩️ | **Setback** | Silent teleport to last safe position | ---
### 🔔 Integrations
📣 **Staff Alerts** — Every flag reaches OP2+ in real time. 💬 **Discord Webhook** — Rich embeds with full details. One line in config. 🔗 **Event API** — `PraxicViolationEvent` for custom mod integrations. ---
### 🔥 REVEX — Escalation Addon *Graduated punishment system built on top of PRAXIC.* *Warn → 15 min → 1 hour → 1 day → permanent. Fully automatic.* [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/revex) [![REVEX on GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/REVEX-GitHub-181717?logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/jrxmod/revex)
--- ### 💬 Commands | Command | Description | |---|---| | `/praxic status` | Module overview | | `/praxic stats` | Session flags, top checks, top players | | `/praxic check ` | Player violations | | `/praxic violations` | Server-wide overview | | `/praxic reset ` | Clear a record | | `/praxic reload` | Hot-reload config | | `/praxic whitelist add\|remove\|list` | Bypass for trusted players | | `/praxic history ` | Persistent log — works offline | *All commands require OP level 2.* --- ### 🚀 Setup 1. Install **Fabric Loader** + **Fabric API** for 1.21.1 2. Drop the jar into `mods/` 3. Start the server — done. Config generates at `config/praxic.json`. Apply changes with `/praxic reload`. ---
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jrxmod/praxic/main/docs/assets/divider.png) *Open source · Apache 2.0 · [Source Code](https://github.com/jrxmod/praxic) · [Report a bug](https://github.com/jrxmod/praxic/issues)* *Active development — detection improves with every release.*
